programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Scaffolder Thomas arrives at London's King's College Hospital after suffering a head injury at a building site and doctors are concerned he may have fractured his skull, back or neck. Hilton, 85, has diabetes and is worried about his swollen legs, and retired architect Edgar is struggling to breathe following an asthma attack. Meanwhile, in the waiting room, two women make friends and swap stories and jokes

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The staff of King's College Hospital reflect on the different ways in which people deal with physical and emotional pain as they treat a new batch of patients. Ahmed, 28, dislocated his shoulder during a game of American football and grits his teeth as a doctor slots it back into place. Meanwhile, 24-year-old Lee is living with Behcet's disease, a condition that affects his nervous system and causes pain so severe he passes out, and father-of-four Simon, 30, has been found unconscious at the bottom of a stairwell and it emerges he hasn't eaten for days following a relationship break-up

programme.title: War Factories

programme.title: Nazi Murder Mysteries
programme.desc: The German police's attempts to catch a depraved and psychotic killer, who struck fear into women travelling on Berlin's S-Bahn train network during the Second World War

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on another journey around the nation with a copy of George Bradshaw's Victorian Railway Guidebook to discover how the railways have affected people and what remains of Bradshaw's Britain. He begins by travelling from High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, to Stratford-upon-Avon in Warwickshire, finding out about the remarkable craftsmen behind the Victorian furniture trade, discovering how George Bradshaw helped save Britain's canal heritage and seeing Shakespeare through the eyes of a 19th-century rail tourist

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo learns how the railways helped to make Birmingham the pen-making capital of the world, hears the chilling tale of one of 19th-century Britain's most notorious murderers and samples delicacies concocted in a Victorian kitchen at Shugborough Hall, Staffordshire

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave finds a very rare 70s Sunbeam Lotus that has been rotting away in a farmyard for 29 years, while a Morris Minor convertible goes under the hammer

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A delightful collection of British classics comes up for auction, including an Austin A35 and a Hillman Avenger Estate in stunning condition. An E-Type Jaguar also hits the auction

programme.title: The World at War

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.desc: Falling boulders threaten the crew and the dig site but their solution could cause a huge landslide. Underground, Shawn and Jeremy find their first piece of Jesuit gold

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored
programme.desc: Explorer Justin Fornal and Emiliano Ruprah investigate an international conspiracy involving the highest levels of government

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing
programme.desc: Terry O'Quinn examines whether the tragic destruction of an Air France airliner in 2009 could ever happen again, and investigates deforestation in Siberian

programme.title: American Chopper
programme.desc: Paul Teutul Jr is given the contract to design and build a custom bike for the New York Giants NFL team, and the employees prepare for the opening of the company's new HQ

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Classic Cars
programme.desc: Paul and Drew set their sights on a Lancia Montecarlo. This classic car needs serious work, but the guys are still willing to offer £7,000 for it

programme.title: Mega Shippers
programme.desc: More logistical headaches arise when one load-master stows £100million of super yacht onto a vessel carrier. Plus, an operations supervisor loads a rare three-wheeled sports car

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: Find out how wood toys, retro toasters, laboratory furnaces, and aerogels are made

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: How combination squares, ball valves, and string trimmers are made. Plus, how shrimp are cultivated on a farm

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: As the remaining tourists adjust to the dramatic events of the last few days, three new couples arrive to shake things up, while one makes a dramatic announcement

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps Newcastle couple Mick and Dianne find a holiday home in and around Gran Alacant on Spain's Costa Blanca, showing them properties within their budget of £120,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Amanda and Adam Cropper have been visiting Phuket in Thailand on holiday for some time and love it so much they decided to get married on the island. Now they're looking for their very own property there, initially to use as a holiday home before they move out full-time in the next few years. Jonnie Irwin guides them through the local market and shows them five properties for their £160,000 budget

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Windsor, Berkshire, the first to host is estate agent Vikki who's hoping to bag the £1000 prize by hosting a ladies day-themed dinner party. The guests she's hoping to impress are entrepreneur and self-proclaimed winner Mohinder, local radio DJ Mary, 66-year-old football-loving Angie and second-hand car dealer Robert. With some gamey golfers, difficult diners and cutting commentary, it promises to be a night her guests won't forget in a hurry

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second night in Windsor, and radio DJ Mary hosts an evening featuring traditional Irish dishes like vegetable soup, steak with champ, and an Eton Mess with a twist

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third host of the week in Windsor is outspoken entrepreneur Mohinder, who hopes to impress his fellow guests with an ambitious menu featuring tulips and a cauliflower foam

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Day four in Windsor is hosted by retired sales manager Angie, who is planning some 1960s fun. However, her guests are not impressed by the rules she lays down at the beginning

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night of the competition in Windsor, Berkshire, car salesman Rob unleashes the mother of all surprises on his guests, welcoming them to his enormous country mansion complete with swimming pool and Ferrari. Estate agent Vicky and radio DJ Mary are smitten by Rob and his house, but for entrepreneur Mohinder it's all too much as he's completely upstaged and realises he is no longer leader of the pack

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: After being bombarded with subtle hints, Carrie throws a surprise party to celebrate Arthur's 75th birthday, roping in a reluctant Doug to take the old man out for the day. However, when the pair visit Arthur's favourite restaurant for lunch, he slopes off

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Deacon try their luck on the gaming tables in Atlantic City, telling Carrie a white lie to ensure there is no trouble at home - but their night proves far from profitable. Kevin James and Victor Williams star

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sam's Mediterranean Kabob Room in Monrovia, California, and within minutes of his arrival, is caught in the crossfire of an argument between the owner, his wife and their children, all of whom are feeling the pressure of working seven days a week. Can the chef save the business and mend the warring family's frayed relationships?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lisa and daughter Jordan are searching for their dream holiday home around the beautiful inland villages of Andalucía. They particularly love the town of Velez-Malaga, so Jonnie Irwin lines up five properties in the area for their budget of £75,000. They have set their sights on a traditional Spanish property with a modern twist, so will Jonnie be able to deliver?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sonia and Andrew are selling their home in the UK and are ready to make the permanent move to inland Almería in Spain to enjoy semi-retirement in the sun. Sonia is keen to set up her own Indian food business, so she needs a large kitchen, and Andrew wants the home to be ultra-modern in design. Laura Hamilton sets out to find five properties within their £145,000 budget that satisfy both their demands

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: A combination of Money for Nothing and The Repair Shop, in which people bring in their old items to be brought back to life. But there's a twist. The experts pitch for the chance to complete the job - then take a share of any profit when the restored relic is sold. Today's items are an unusual paraffin stove, a set of dilapidated farmhouse drawers and a battered travel chest

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: In Newquay, surfer Katy Beddoe is preparing to jump back into competitions after a knee injury, while Cornish horseman David Jones and his daughter Myrtle ready their heavy horses for an old-fashioned ploughing contest. In Ilfracombe in north Devon, harbourmaster Georgina Carlo-Paat takes delivery of a new robotic waterborne litter picker

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: It's naked raku week in the pottery, as the potters throw, burnish and fire a pair of vases to impress judges Rich Miller and Keith Brymer Jones. In the spot test, a guest judge, flower-making expert Rita Floyd, sets a floral challenge, but who will be named potter of the week, and who will leave the pottery? Presented by Siobhan McSweeney

programme.title: Secret Safari: Into the Wild
programme.desc: A zebra foal is threatened by a leopard that has stolen into the herd's enclosure, while a teenage rhino reluctant to leave his mother is encouraged by rangers to find a mate. A hyena cub who is the runt of his litter is used to coming last when food is divided up between his siblings - until he happens upon a dead antelope

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the game show mash-up, with Rachel Riley and Susie Dent. Jon Richardson and Sara Pascoe take on Sean Lock and Richard Ayoade. Nick Helm joins Susie in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Phil Spencer returns to Cullercoats on North Tyneside to catch up with Mark and Suze, who were unable to agree on what to do with their four-bed Victorian town house. When Kirstie and Phil first met the couple nine months earlier, emotional ties to their home had left them in limbo, with Suzie feeling like she was unable to leave, but Mark longed to move into a bigger home with a better layout for their family. Now, Phil returns to find out if they followed through with their decision

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows an ambitious build in Cornwall, as Leigh and Richard transform a derelict 17th century flour mill into a contemporary, three-bedroom home. They employ traditional craftsmen to start work on restoring the exterior, but it's not long before the true scale of the damage to the structure is revealed, and as the costs rise, they are forced to take more of the work themselves

programme.title: Jamie and Jimmy's Friday Night Feast
programme.desc: In this episode, filmed in 2019, Hollywood legend Susan Sarandon swaps the glamour of Hollywood for Southend Pier, as Jamie and Jimmy make Sicilian-inspired chicken thighs wrapped in smoky pancetta, inspired by the actress' Italian roots. Plus, the hosts are bubbling over with excitement as they get to make their very own English sparkling wine, and must leave the Capri behind when they sample the wares a little too enthusiastically

programme.title: Shut-Ins: Britain's Fattest People
programme.desc: This episode features mum-of-three Samantha, who feels that her issues with food and her weight have made her life intolerable. Samantha feels too ashamed to go out, leaving the responsibilities of family life to her husband Keith. She also experiences severe headaches caused by intercranial hypertension. But with a grandchild on the way, Samantha is determined to break old habits and change her life

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at Flynn's Pub and Guesthouse in Hackney, east London, run by friends Serena and Kelly, who pride themselves on having clean and stylish rooms

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: Brendan blows the budget as he gains private access to a theme park, where one tourist has the ride of her life

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: The owners of a glampsite have transport trouble in Portugal. A former art teacher opens a gallery in Spain, while mother-and-daughter equestrians hope to ride out a rough patch

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman goes house hunting on Spain's Costa Blanca with Barnsley couple Paul and Lisa, who cannot wait to buy their first property together in the ever-popular resort of Torrevieja. They have three children and seven grandchildren wanting to visit, so the pressure is on Jasmine to find a holiday home the whole family can enjoy. With a £72,000 budget, she shows them five options - but will any measure up to their expectations?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: A few years ago, Marie Ash had a holiday romance on Fuerteventura. It didn't last, but her love for the island did. Now Marie has decided the island would be the perfect place for her and her eight-year-old son to spend quality time together in the school holidays. Scarlette Douglas shows Marie - and her best friend Helen - how far her £90,000 budget will go

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hotel duty manager Andrew Carruthers hosts the first dinner party from Cumbria, where he hopes to impress his fellow diners with his hotel-themed evening, complete with five-star quality food including 'early reservation fishcakes' and a 'do not disturb truffle' in an attempt to win the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fitness fanatic Jonny Thompson hosts the second night in Cumbria, where he hopes to wow his guests with a meaty menu - and they get to see a lot more of him than they had bargained for

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Eccentric sheepdog trainer Katy Cropper hosts the third dinner party in Cumbria, where she prepares 'come a cropper' prawns al fresco, opens a bottle of Champagne with a Masai sword, and serves some potent home-made horseradish sauce. Aside from the food, a sheep-herding demonstration proves to be a hit with her guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Holly Venning hosts the fourth dinner party from Cumbria and the food marketing manager wants to show her love for her home county through her menu. She prepares Cumbrian scallops and chorizo, followed by a traditional Cumberland sausage - but her Penrith fudge pudding doesn't appeal to everybody

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Estate agent Wendy Tinnion helms the final event in Cumbria and decides to throw a Friday night disco for her fellow diners. However, her guests are in for a shock when they discover something unexpected about their host

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug reveals his benevolent side when he decides to become a mentor to an underprivileged child, but is disappointed with the boy assigned to him. Meanwhile, Carrie has to explain to a partner in her law firm why she declared her love for him over the phone. Kevin James and Leah Remini star

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug is duped by his neighbour into buying a water filtration device. He is drawn deeper into trouble when he signs up to be a licensed seller and needs to find 10 more salesmen to follow in his footsteps to recoup his investment. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Florida to help the owners of Fleming, a Danish restaurant in Miami. A husband-and-wife duo bought the business eight years ago in the hope of continuing the place's success, but started losing money rapidly. With a Cuban chef cooking Nordic cuisine and a filthy kitchen, things go from bad to worse until it all comes to a head on relaunch night

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas is house hunting along the south-east coast of Cyprus with mother and daughter Pat and Tash from Reading, Berkshire. Pat has been longing to buy a holiday home for 20 years, but has always been too busy working and caring for her family to turn the dream into a reality. Now she's retired, she's finally seizing the moment, and is poised to consider the five options Scarlette has found for her within her £70,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps a midwife and her father to find a holiday home in Menorcan resort Cala en Porter with a pool and space to set up a beauty salon, on a budget of £325,000

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: Britain's best makers and menders go head to head, pitching for the job of bringing some dilapidated relics back to life in return for a share of the item's sale price. Simon from Nottingham is hoping to find a furniture enthusiast to breathe new life into an unusual pair of armchairs. Ben from Leeds brings in his grandfather's old machining lathe, hoping either restorers Alastair or Bruce can help get this old lathe purring like a kitten once more. The final item is a rare and innovative wardrobe, known as a gentleman's compactum, brought in by Sean from north Wales

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon and his team attempt to revamp a seafood restaurant in Manquin, Virginia, a town near the beach that's popular with fishermen. But it has one of the most disgusting kitchens Gordon has ever seen

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Returning to the moment the coronavirus first hit - with everyone propelled headlong into a strange new world, struggling to keep pace with the dramatic impact on everyday life. The crisis has affected every aspect of policing, from the first point of contact in the call handling centre to the rapid adaptation of front-line protocols. In February 2020, call handlers suddenly saw a sharp influx of anxious calls, with a corresponding increase in erratic behaviour from the public

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: An aspiring paralympian goes on a date with a former footballer, while a double divorcee hopes to make it third time lucky, if her long list of very specific requirements do not hold her back. A car salesman ponders how to raise the subject of BDSM on his first date with a primary school teacher, and a previous visitor to the bar returns for a second try

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. She is joined by 25-year-old estate agent Hollie-Anna from Margate and 29-year-old Jaison from Norwich, a transsexual man who feels like he has exhausted his local dating pool. They will both choose a date after seeing what their potential partners have to offer on a purely physical level. But will they prove to be a good match?

programme.desc: Makeup artist Charlie brings in a Scandinavia table with two legs sawn off, while photographer Murray brings in an original printer's cabinet, complete with brass fonts

programme.desc: A patient is brought in having broken his leg playing American football, while a resident at a neurological hospital is examined for signs that he has suffered a stroke. programme.desc: Following the complex build of an extraordinary home costing millions in Mayfair, London, which belongs to self-made billionaire and philanthropist John Caudwell. Having sold Phones 4u in 2006 for just under 1.5 billion pounds, John is now aiming to create one of the most lavish and expensive homes ever to be renovated in Britain. As the build enters the final crucial stages, the programme follows this unique and challenging engineering project as a team of expert trades people and interior designers attempt to pull off one of the most extraordinary renovations in Britain

programme.desc: Action from heat two of the annual event, held this year in Bradenton, Florida. Great Britain's Adam Bishop and Mark Felix battled it out with Americans Evan Singleton and Kevin Faires and Russia's Mikhail Shivlyakov in events including the farmers walk and deadlift

programme.title: World's Strongest Man 2020
programme.desc: Action from heat three of the annual event, held this year in Bradenton, Florida. Great Britain's Tom Stoltman and Gavin Bilton battled it out with American Trey Mitchell, Oleksii Novikov of the Ukraine and Canada's Maxime Boudreault in events including the farmers walk and deadlift

programme.title: World's Strongest Man 2020
programme.desc: Action from heat four of the annual event, held this year in Bradenton, Florida. Great Britain's Graham Hicks battled it out with the likes of American Bobby Thompson and Canada's Jean-Francois Caron in events including the farmers walk and deadlift

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on two residential disputes that escalated from complaints about noise-making to far more serious quarrels. Warren and Sharee detail how their peaceful lives in a quiet Birmingham suburb were ruined when new neighbour Harry moved in. Harry complained of noise the pair knew wasn't coming from their household, an accusation he would level more than once, and with increasing intensity. Finally, when the hostile Harry pulled out a gun and threatened the couple over their garden fence, they were forced to sell up and move out. However, even after relocating, it seemed their nightmare was not over. Also featured is the story of Jill, who was just a teenager when Barry, who lived with his parents next-door, became fixated on her family making a racket. Brushing off the grievance, Jill and her relatives tried to get on with their lives, but one autumn day the feud took a tragic, life-changing turn

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The series investigating residential disputes continues, turning attention to feuds that turned violent. Among the stories highlighted are that of former paratrooper Rod who was attacked outside his own home by a knife-wielding neighbour, and 71-year-old Michael, a Suffolk villager whose fellow residents claim he has systematically harassed them, culminating in an assault in which he punched one of his neighbours repeatedly - an incident that was caught on camera. The programme also considers the devastating consequences when personal altercations end up escalating into neighbourhood wars, revealing how a conflict between the Webbs and the Browns in transformed their street in Devon into a war-zone

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor are in Manchester to recover £4,000 owed to a firm of architects, only for the debtor to attempt to throw them off the scent. Stewart is joined by Vic in Liverpool to track down a landlord who owes his former tenants deposits totalling £5,000, while Gareth and Mitch are in for a surprise when they chase a builder in Wiltshire

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry try to recover more than £6,000 owed in nursery fees in Warwickshire, while Gary and Cona head to West Sussex, chasing £11,000 owed by a businessman who has defaulted on a previous plan, and have no option but to break into the property. The pair also head down to the south coast of England, seeking more than £3,500 owed for an unpaid loan

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry are in Wolverhampton, where a woman who owes £2,000 in parking fines denies knowing the debtor - despite being a relative. But when her mother also gets involved, tempers start to fray. Stewart and Iain confront a woman in Cheshire who is refusing to pay fees to a veterinary practice, claiming her dog has been misdiagnosed, while Paul and Max collect £5,000 owed by a banned company director in east London accused of mis-selling assets on the stock market

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gary and Paul visit Kent to recover £2,500 owed by a publican to a utilities supplier - only to find themselves in the middle of a family at war. Stewart and Elmor deal with a sensitive case in Liverpool, as they repossess a property where the tenant has failed to pay any rent for almost a year

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Noticing how happy Shane is with Amy, Dipi decides to keep her heartbreak to herself and allow him a joyful new relationship. Bea secretly assembles the billy cart for Levi

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Bella and Dean try to get in touch with Colby in case he is in trouble. Justin seems to be in recovery after Christian's surgery. Martha receives a disturbing handwritten note

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Internet entrepreneur Martin and his partner in grime Glenn hear about a huge fly-tipping operation blighting a remote Hampshire beauty spot, and raise a small army of volunteers who roll up their sleeves to sort it themselves. Meanwhile, the UK's network of motorways and A-roads rely upon a system of lay-bys to help keep drivers safe, but these safe pull-in zones also attract an unsightly collection of filthy behaviour, and it falls to Huntingdon lay-by warriors Clive and Steve to take on the speeding traffic, atrocious weather, drunk drivers - and those people who confuse lay-bys with lavatories

programme.title: Casualty 24/7
programme.desc: Staffing problems hit the department as several nurses call in sick, and young manager Tom has to use his charm to get the team to commit to working extra shifts. Paramedics are concerned about a family that were involved in a road traffic accident, and consultant Julian treats a critically ill patient with undiagnosed symptoms

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red

programme.title: World's Strongest Man 2020

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The observational documentary shedding light on residential disputes concludes with an insight into how suburban feuds can breed anger, suspicion and fear, and cause people to resort to subterfuge to get their way. Among the stories highlighted are that of Leslie, whose neighbours began capturing his activities on film, convinced that his trade business was illegal, and Phil, who was assigned a restraining order after his ex-mayor neighbour made recordings that proved he was harassing her. Also featured are two tales in which old friendships were ruined when certain parties resorted to breaching each other's privacy and round-the-clock surveillance

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

But when her mother also gets involved, tempers start to fray. Stewart and Iain confront a woman in Cheshire who is refusing to pay fees to a veterinary practice, claiming her dog has been misdiagnosed, while Paul and Max collect £5,000 owed by a banned company director in east London accused of mis-selling assets on the stock market

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Angels & Demons (2009)
programme.desc: Academic adventurer Robert Langdon is called in by the Vatican to deal with a crisis. Pope Pius XVI has died suddenly and the four cardinals in line to be his successor have all been abducted by a mysterious sect that is threatening to murder them. As he searches for the kidnapped clerics, Langdon discovers the cult has an even more horrific plan in mind involving a stolen canister of anti-matter. Ron Howard takes the reins once again for the sequel to The Da Vinci Code, with Tom Hanks, Ewan McGregor, Ayelet Zurer Stellan Skarsgard and Pierfrancesco Favino

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the murders of a firefighter and his wife. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the murders of two scientists found stabbed to death following a fire. The evidence points to a mentally disturbed woman, but Cutter and Rubirosa suspect she may have been manipulated by someone else

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate a seemingly random drive-by shooting, but soon suspect the victim's husband may know more than he is letting on. To make matters worse, the hospital in which the victim was pronounced dead appears to have contributed to her demise - putting a highly respected surgeon's reputation on the line. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis trace a robbery suspect to a militia group, but McCoy is strangely affected by the leader's devotion to his cause - and begins to receive death threats once the case comes to court. Award-winning police drama, starring Benjamin Bratt and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A key witness in a murder trial is found dead outside her hotel room, and Lupo and Bernard's investigation embroils them in a conspiracy involving black-market dealings, drug cartels and corrupt officials. With the lives of other witnesses in danger, Rubirosa finds herself caught in the crossfire

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An elderly man is declared a neighbourhood hero after he shoots three people in an armed raid on his store. However, Lupo and Bernard soon begin to suspect that there is more to this incident than meets the eye, fearing it could have been a scare tactic for a shakedown. Elliott Gould guest stars, with Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team suspects a desperate US Marine may have faked his own death with the help of a friend and blown up an ambulance in a botched attempt to cover all traces of the subterfuge. Subsequent developments, including a mysterious disappearance, seem to confirm the hypothesis - until a timely discovery by Abby throws new light on the case

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents are called to a national forest where several women have gone missing and conclude there may be a serial killer at large - a theory confirmed in gruesome fashion as the investigation proceeds. Drama, with Mark Harmon and David McCallum

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called to a high school on a marine base, where a pupil has taken his classmates hostage and is threatening to detonate a bomb strapped to his chest. Gibbs manages to enter the classroom in an attempt to dissuade the boy, but soon realises someone else may be controlling his actions. Drama, with Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU investigates a 'he-said, she-said' case when a woman crashes a wedding to accuse her therapist of sexual assault. Hard-hitting and emotional drama, directed by Lucy Liu and starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Two surprise sniper attacks on the NYPD leave the SVU squad scrambling for answers. When the link between the shootings appears to be Detective Tutuola, he reconnects with his former Narcotics partner to uncover a possible motive tied to their old cases. As the violence continues, Lieutenant Eames joins the investigation and the unit races to hunt down a killer no one saw coming

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A comatose woman is found clinging to life in a rowboat after an assault on the East River near the mayor's home. The victim's condition leads to a complex investigation reconstructing her recent activities, and the detectives' findings uncover some surprising results. Richard Thomas (The Waltons) guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Two ambitious district attorneys clash over a murder case, and Benson is sure the prosecuting county has wrongly accused a rape victim of killing her ex-boyfriend. New evidence and a different suspect are put forward, but the Suffolk County DA will not drop her case. Hard-hitting drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A janitor violently attacks a school coach, but the SVU team uncovers mitigating circumstances, connecting his behaviour to a history of sexual abuse. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the death of war veteran Greg Tanner, whose body was discovered in a Hudson University car park. The first episode in the final season of the crime drama, starring Jeremy Sisto, Anthony Anderson and Sam Waterston

programme.desc: Baltimore detectives Munch and Falsone head for pastures new, travelling to New York to aid the investigation into the death of a teenage model, while McCoy has a fight on his hands with the attorney representing the victim's parents. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The parents of a baby given up for adoption could provide a clue to the death of a new mother - but the investigation also turns up long-buried family secrets. The detectives are forced to consider the possibility that racial prejudice played a part in the case

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives Lupo and Bernard investigate when a community activist is murdered. Meanwhile, Van Buren gets bad news from former detective Ray Curtis. Police drama, starring Jeremy Sisto, Anthony Anderson and S Epatha Merkerson

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The investigation into a freelance journalist's murder leads detectives Lupo and Bernard to uncover a connection between the victim and a talk-show host. Crime drama, starring Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is called to a frozen lake, where two children have discovered the body of a missing US Marine. The team searches the water for clues and finds three more bullet-ridden corpses, all of which have tattoos linking them to a notorious street gang. The case then becomes a race against time to discover what connects the murders before the serviceman's comrades seek revenge

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is assigned to examine the apparent suicide of a Pentagon cryptographer suspected of spying. The case is thrown into disarray by the discovery of evidence indicating another person was present at the time of death - meaning the real mole may still be on the loose and has already killed at least once. Crime drama, with Mark Harmon and David McCallum

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Abby becomes the target of an assassination attempt while working in the lab - and the team's search for her would-be killer leads to the main suspect in an embezzlement trial at which she is appearing as a witness. However, subsequent developments also place her ex-boyfriend in the frame. Mark Harmon, Pauley Perrette and Michael Weatherly star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Thin Ice (2009)
programme.desc: A New England police chief is involved in a shoot-out that leaves his friend badly wounded. Coming under investigation by Internal Affairs, he finds himself increasingly at odds with the town council and defies its wishes by helping a woman search for her missing child. Detective thriller, starring Tom Selleck and Kathy Baker

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits London, where she is introduced to an MP, a meeting that proves to be the kiss of death for the unfortunate fellow. However, the mystery surrounding his murder deepens as the corpse goes missing only to reappear with a new identity. Whodunit, guest starring Trevor Eve and Sharon Maughan

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A daytime soap queen's husband is shot dead - but, luckily, one of her neighbours just happens to be amateur sleuth Jessica Fletcher. With Angela Lansbury. Guest starring Kate Mulgrew (Star Trek: Voyager)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's sleuthing skills come into play as she sets out to clear a university colleague of a murder charge, after a man who apparently migrated to New York on a revenge mission is killed. Angela Lansbury and George Hearn star

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica tries to clear medic Seth Hazlitt after he is threatened with a possible malpractice suit when the owner of Cabot Cove's computer company dies in mysterious circumstances. Drama, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica travels to Mexico City on a research trip, and her arrival coincides with the theft of the National Museum's most prized artefact, the solid gold Death Mask of Montezuma. When Enrico Montejano, a corrupt local businessman suspected of the crime, is found murdered, Jessica offers to help the police find the culprit

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica goes to California to help playwright Martin Tremaine come to terms with his wife's suicide - but the killing of another member of his family makes her realise he was the intended victim. Guest starring Darren McGavin and Ken Kercheval

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A spate of murder and mayhem shocks Cabot Cove - and it coincides with the arrival of one of Seth's old army friends, who immediately becomes the prime suspect. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica devises an ingenious new board game with a murderous theme - and it is not long before life starts imitating art in deadly fashion. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A female producer is intent on scuppering a project forged at a film festival, only to die in mysterious circumstances. Jessica investigates and soon brings the villain to book. Mystery, starring Angela Lansbury and Susan Blakely

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Controversy grips New York when a black teenager is shot by a white celebrity chef, who claims she was defending herself against the city's serial rapist - an assumption that proved incorrect. Assistant District Attorney Barba faces a tough battle against a shrewd defence lawyer as he seeks justice for the victim and his family

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An officer accuses his former colleagues from the 12th Precinct of fraud and cover-ups, but it results in him being committed to a psychiatric ward. The Internal Affairs Bureau asks members of the SVU to assist their investigation, and Cassidy is sent in undercover - but his life is threatened when someone in the crooked team is prepared to stop at nothing to keep things the way they are

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives make their way to a recording studio after receiving a domestic abuse call from prominent R'n'B singer Mischa, who claims she was attacked by her rapper boyfriend. Armed with information as to his likely whereabouts, Amaro and Fin head off to confront him

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The trial of pimp Bart Ganzel begins. Meanwhile, Detective Cassidy is accused of raping a woman while undercover, resulting in a court appearance of his own. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate the case of a female lawyer found dead on a bus, having been forcibly injected with a fatal overdose of bee venom causing an anaphylactic shock. Monroe helps determine it to be the work of a feral bee queen, the sworn enemy of Hexebiests and the investigators' attention switches to a legal case the victim was working on just prior to her death

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A woman is struck by a car while suffering terrifying hallucinations. Though seriously injured she survives the accident, but during the commotion an unidentified man arrives on the scene and strangles her. Nick and Hank investigate, and discover a goat-like creature that could be behind a series of recent disappearances

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin visit two houses up for auction in Gravesend, Kent and Shipley in Derbyshire, and former church premises in Harrow Weald

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Only seven pounds separates antiques experts James Braxton and Raj Bisram as they set off in Cheshire heading to their final auction in Somerset. programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen and Phil are keen to know how things went between unlikely lovebirds Laura and Mike, so both end up invited to lunch - where they relate conflicting stories. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: Exploring assumptions about the origins of American popular music, including the belief that drums were brought to the USA by enslaved people from the coastal regions of Africa. The programme travels to Austria, Texas and the edge of the Sahara desert to uncover the real story behind the theories

programme.title: The Knowledge: The World's Toughest Taxi Test
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the test that all black cab drivers working in the city of London must take, one of the world's toughest exams - The Knowledge of London. Each candidate must memorise the capital's 25,000 streets, traffic restrictions and ever-changing points of interest, which takes an average of four years of determination to successfully pass

programme.title: Strongroom (1962)
programme.desc: Two people are locked in a bank vault during a robbery, but the crooks have a crisis of conscience and try to free them while avoiding the police. Crime drama, with Colin Gordon

programme.title: The Gay Dog (1954)
programme.desc: The owner of a racing greyhound loses faith in his dog's ability to win when he encounters a faster animal. However, his friends are determined to prove him wrong. Comedy, starring Wilfred Pickles, Petula Clark and Megs Jenkins

programme.title: Moby Dick (1956)
programme.desc: Obsessive skipper Captain Ahab leads his ship and crew on an epic quest to find and kill the legendary white whale that bit off his leg - but his lust for vengeance endangers all their lives. John Huston's seafaring adventure, based on Herman Melville's novel, starring Gregory Peck, Richard Baseheart, Orson Welles and Leo Genn

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours narrated by Dewyne Lindsay, this time exploring Camden and Sydenham for locals and tourists.

programme.title: The Bionic Vet
programme.desc: A woman with a seven-month-old puppy faces a difficult decision when Noel Fitzpatrick reveals he must perform a risky operation to treat the young dog's bone deformities. Two animals injured in road accidents are rushed into the surgery and a Labrador puts its newly transplanted hip to the test when it is reunited with its owner

programme.title: London Districts

programme.desc: Roy visits Amber's therapist to help raise his spirits, and ends up revealing fantasies about his neighbour Sally, whom the counsellor then meets at a dinner party, where a mutual attraction quickly develops, urging Tom and Roy to take desperate measures to keep them apart. Comedy, starring Clive Swift and Roger Lloyd Pack

programme.title: Rude Boy (1980)
programme.desc: A fan of new wave punks The Clash follows his musical heroes on tour, but slowly finds himself disagreeing with their ideals. Ray Gange stars in this semi-documentary view of street politics in the 1980s, including concert footage of the band

programme.title: Killer Weekend (2018)
programme.desc: Sam is thrilled about the thought of going on a zombie-themed stag do with his mates. However, it takes a disastrous turn on the first day, leaving the unlucky party pals holed up in a nuclear bunker. Director Ben Kent's comedy horror, starring Mark Heap, Sean Verey and Danny Kirrane

programme.title: Kevcoin: The Movie (2018)
programme.desc: Wannabe music producer Kevin Powder hatches a scheme to get rich by creating his own cryptocurrency, with each token valued at a trillion dollars. But to make his plan a reality, he needs to hit the streets in search of investors. Spoof documentary, starring Jason Attar and Dominic Geraghty

programme.title: They Made Me a Fugitive (1947)
programme.desc: Soho black marketeers frame a former RAF pilot for murder, forcing him to go on the run until he can exact revenge on them. Thriller, starring Trevor Howard, Sally Gray and Griffith Jones

programme.title: Dandy Dick (1935)
programme.desc: A church vicar tries a variety of schemes to come up with money to fix the church's steeple. When his plans fail, he bets his savings on a horse race. Comedy, starring Will Hay

programme.desc: Five sailors spend their overnight leave in London, where they get involved with a variety of unusual characters. Drama, starring Bernard Lee, Heather Sears and John Bonney

programme.title: Ultimate Force
programme.desc: Military drama following life for a group of SAS recruits, starring Ross Kemp

programme.title: Dying of the Light (2014)
programme.desc: A CIA agent is diagnosed with a degenerative condition that results in him being forced to retire from the world of intelligence. When he receives word that a terrorist who once tortured him has resurfaced, he goes rogue and sets out to assassinate the man while he is still able. Thriller, starring Nicolas Cage, Anton Yelchin and Irene Jacob

programme.title: The Harder They Come (1973)
programme.desc: A naive young man from rural Jamaica heads for Kingston in search of reggae stardom, only to get involved in the shady world of drug dealing as his musical career takes off. With no other option but to go on the run, he fights back against the system which forced him into a life of crime and becomes a political hero in the process. Crime drama, starring Jimmy Cliff, Janet Barkley, Carl Bradshaw and Bob Charlton

programme.title: Cruel Passion (1977)
programme.desc: Two sisters are expelled from a nunnery and are plunged into a life of debauchery. While one embraces her new lifestyle, the other is desperate to cling to her old morality and sees a hope of salvation in a mysterious aristocrat who harbours a hidden dark side. Historical drama based on the novel Justine by the Marquis de Sade, starring Koo Stark and Martin Potter

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: The lives, loves and laundry of the famous stars living in leafy Surbiton, as performed by impressionists John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: Exploring assumptions about the origins of American popular music, including the belief that drums were brought to the USA by enslaved people from the coastal regions of Africa. The programme travels to Austria, Texas and the edge of the Sahara desert to uncover the real story behind the theories

programme.desc: Four children on a camping holiday in Italy are involved in a dangerous cable car accident that leaves them dangling 150 feet above a glacier. Children's adventure, starring Richard Owens and Mark Jefferis

programme.title: The Case of the Frightened Lady (1940)
programme.desc: A woman employed as a secretary to her aristocratic aunt has to contend with sinister servants plotting behind her back and a scheme by her employer to marry her off to her own cousin. The situation is complicated further when the family's doctor is accused of murder. Thriller, starring Marius Goring and Penelope Dudley-Ward

programme.title: The Gay Dog (1954)
programme.desc: The owner of a racing greyhound loses faith in his dog's ability to win when he encounters a faster animal. However, his friends are determined to prove him wrong. Comedy, starring Wilfred Pickles, Petula Clark and Megs Jenkins

programme.title: Calculated Risk (1963)
programme.desc: An ex-convict plans one last daring heist, by tunneling into a bank vault through the basement of a neighbouring house. Crime drama, starring William Lucas and John Rutland

programme.title: Strongroom (1962)
programme.desc: Two people are locked in a bank vault during a robbery, but the crooks have a crisis of conscience and try to free them while avoiding the police. Crime drama, with Colin Gordon

programme.title: A Chorus of Disapproval (1988)
programme.desc: A shy widower gets entangled in romantic intrigue while rehearsing with an amateur theatrical troupe in Scarborough. Comedy based on Alan Ayckbourn's stage play, starring Jeremy Irons, Anthony Hopkins, Prunella Scales, Lionel Jeffries, Jenny Seagrove, Gareth Hunt and Patsy Kensit

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Ash must disarm a bomb in the London Underground that uses a new type of fuse, and discovers that he may still have a chance with Susan

programme.title: Our Queen
programme.desc: Feature-length documentary filmed throughout 2012, providing an in-depth portrait of Elizabeth II during her Diamond Jubilee year. Prince Charles and other members of the royal family share their stories, providing insights into the Queen's life over an important and busy 12 months filled with celebrations. The programme also reveals what really happens when the prime minister sits down with the monarch, and the lid is lifted on that memorable 007 moment at the London Olympic Games opening ceremony

programme.title: Go With Me (2015)
programme.desc: A woman returns to the isolated logging community where she grew up, and is stalked by a former cop, who now heads up a criminal organisation in the area that operates above the law. She resolves to take a stand against him, seeking the aid of a retired logger and his sidekick. Thriller based on Castle Freeman Jr's novel, starring Julia Stiles, Anthony Hopkins, Alexander Ludwig and Ray Liotta

programme.title: Mad Dog Morgan (1976)
programme.desc: An Irishman seeking his fortune in the Australian Gold Rush ends up in prison when driven to robbery out of desperation. After 12 years of abuse, he is released and becomes an outlaw, determined to make society pay for his suffering - and becoming a hero to the downtrodden in the process. Fact-based Western, starring Dennis Hopper and Jack Thompson

programme.title: This That and the Other (1970)
programme.desc: Anthology of three comic tales. A fading movie star tries to seduce a producer, a suicidal loner is snapped out of his misery by a hippy, and a taxi driver suffers a blow to the head that leaves him experiencing erotic hallucinations. Comedy, starring Victor Spinetti, Dennis Waterman, Vanda Hudson and John Bird

programme.title: The Uber Story
programme.desc: Uber is among the most recognisable brands in the world. But their ride to success has been far from smooth. How did the app giant outsmart regulators and crush its competitors?

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.title: British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: Australia v British & Irish Lions. Extended highlights of the First Test at the Suncorp Stadium in Brisbane, as the 2013 three-match series got under way. The tourists had already played here against Queensland Reds and will have been aware of the need to start strongly against the injury-hit Wallabies. Lions coach Warren Gatland has a strong squad to select from and was looking to begin in the same fashion as the 2001 vintage, who won in Brisbane in the opening Test of that tour

programme.title: British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: Australia v British & Irish Lions. Action from the Second Test at the Etihad Stadium in Melbourne, as the Lions aimed to clinch the 2013 series after winning a thrilling First Test 23-21. The Lions suffered their heaviest defeat on this ground during the 2001 tour, as the Aussies overturned a half-time deficit to run away 35-14 victors. With just one Test remaining, the result here will determine whether there is anything riding on next Saturday's final showdown

programme.title: British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: Australia v British & Irish Lions. Action from the third and final Test at the ANZ Stadium in Sydney, as the 2013 tour reached its conclusion. The opening two Tests were both decided by the narrowest of margins - the Lions prevailed 23-21 in the opener in Brisbane, as Australia missed a chance to win the match with the final kick of the game, before the Wallabies earned revenge by triumphing 16-15 in Melbourne, with the visitors failing to score from a last-gasp penalty attempt on that occasio

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Crystal Palace v Watford. Action from the 2012/13 Championship play-off final at Wembley Stadium, as the teams contested a place in the top flight alongside the already promoted Cardiff City and Hull City. Palace reached this match when Wilfried Zaha scored a brace in a 2-0 away win against Brighton & Hove Albion after a goalless draw in the first leg. Meanwhile, Watford bounced back from narrowly missing out on automatic promotion by overcoming Leicester City in dramatic fashion, with Troy Deeney scoring an injury time-winner on the counter after Manuel Almunia had saved a penalty
